query: Judson Althoff CEO commercial business Microsoft promotion date official announcement

mako.raw:
{"query":"Judson Althoff CEO commercial business Microsoft promotion date official announcement","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1564,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2025/10/01/accelerating-our-commercial-growth/","title":"Accelerating our commercial growth - The Official Microsoft Blog","content":"Additionally, Judson will lead a new commercial leadership team that brings together leaders from engineering, sales, marketing, operations, and finance to drive our product strategy and governance, GTM readiness, and sales motions with shared accountability for the rigor and executional excellence our customers expect.
Surface Pro Surface Laptop Surface Laptop Ultra Surface RTX Spark Dev Box Copilot for organizations Copilot for personal use Explore Microsoft products Windows 11 apps Account profile Download Center Microsoft Store support Returns Order tracking Certified Refurbished Microsoft Store Promise Flexible Payments Microsoft in education Devices for education Microsoft Teams for Education Microsoft 365 Education How to buy for your school Educator training and development Deals for students and parents AI for education"},{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2025/10/01/microsoft-makes-sales-chief-althoff-ceo-of-commercial-business.html","title":"Microsoft makes sales chief Althoff CEO of commercial business","content":"His group will now include marketing and operations, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella said.
Microsoft's top-ranking sales leader, Judson Althoff, has been promoted to a bigger role as CEO of the company's commercial business.
Most of Microsoft's revenue comes from commercial offerings such as productivity software subscriptions and cloud-based Nvidia chips for running artificial intelligence models.
His most recent title was executive vice president and chief commercial officer.
Under Nadella, who replaced Steve Ballmer as CEO in 2014, Microsoft has more frequently used the CEO title for select executives."},{"url":"https://www.businessinsider.com/microsoft-commercial-ceo-judson-althoff-changing-top-ranks-2026-2","title":"Microsoft's New Commercial CEO Is Changing His Top Ranks, Memo Shows - Business Insider","content":"Judson Althoff, a veteran Microsoft executive recently promoted to commercial CEO, is making changes to the top ranks of his team, according to an internal memo viewed by Business Insider.
Althoff's promotion was intended to give CEO Satya Nadella and Microsoft's engineering leaders more time to focus on AI, according to an internal memo viewed by Business Insider, which described the moment as "a tectonic AI platform shift."
In this new role, Cupp will help handle the company's most strategic customer accounts and executive relationships."},{"url":"https://news.microsoft.com/source/exec/judson-althoff/","title":"Judson Althoff - Source","content":"Microsoft AI Microsoft Security Dynamics 365 Microsoft 365 Microsoft Power Platform Microsoft Teams Microsoft 365 Copilot Small Business Azure Microsoft Developer Microsoft Learn Support for AI marketplace apps Microsoft Tech Community Microsoft Marketplace Software companies Visual Studio Careers About Microsoft Company news Privacy at Microsoft Investors Diversity and inclusion Accessibility Sustainability"},{"url":"https://msdynamicsworld.com/story/microsoft-promotes-judson-althoff-lead-commercial-business","title":"Microsoft promotes Judson Althoff to lead commercial business | MSDynamicsWorld.com","content":"Althoff has spent nine years leading the global sales organization.
When Microsoft began its new fiscal year in July 2025 and announced a restructuring of the partner-focused MCAPS program, Althoff was on a two-month sabbatical."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Judson Althoff CEO commercial business Microsoft promotion date official announcement","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2025/10/01/microsoft-makes-sales-chief-althoff-ceo-of-commercial-business.html","title":"Microsoft makes sales chief Althoff CEO of commercial business","content":"# Microsoft sales chief Althoff gets new role as CEO of company's commercial business. Microsoft's top-ranking sales leader, Judson Althoff, has been promoted to a bigger role as CEO of the company's commercial business. Satya Nadella, Microsoft's CEO, wrote in a memo on Wednesday that marketing and operations will move under Althoff's organization. \"Our success depends on enabling commercial and public sector customers and partners to combine their human capital with new AI capabilities to change the frontier of how they operate,\" Nadella wrote in the email. \"To accelerate this, we will increasingly need to bring together sales, marketing, operations, and engineering to drive growth and strengthen our position as the partner of choice for AI transformation.\". Althoff, who joined from Oracle as president of Microsoft's North America business in 2013, was already among Microsoft's highest-paid executives, receiving more than $23 million in total pay in the 2024 fiscal year. Public Microsoft is promoting Judson Althoff, currently executive vice president","score":0.67166495,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.theverge.com/news/789558/microsoft-ceo-commercial-judson-althoff-internal-memo","title":"Satya Nadella appoints a new CEO to run Microsoft's ...","content":"In an internal memo to employees today, Nadella announced Althoff's promotion and said it's linked with the need for Microsoft to reinvent","score":0.5786631,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.businessinsider.com/microsoft-commercial-ceo-judson-althoff-changing-top-ranks-2026-2","title":"Microsoft's New Commercial CEO Is Changing His Top Ranks, Memo Shows - Business Insider","content":"# Microsoft's new commercial CEO is making changes to his top ranks, internal memo shows. Judson Althoff, a veteran Microsoft executive recently promoted to commercial CEO, is making changes to the top ranks of his team, according to an internal memo viewed by Business Insider. He elevated Deb Cupp to executive vice president and chief revenue officer of global enterprise sales, according to the memo. Althoff's promotion was intended to give CEO Satya Nadella and Microsoft's engineering leaders more time to focus on AI, according to an internal memo viewed by Business Insider, which described the moment as \"a tectonic AI platform shift.\". Althoff described the move as \"bringing together our full spectrum of services including Industry Solutions Delivery, Customer Success, and Support — across Customer Experience & Success.\" Anand's previous title was president and chief commercial experience officer, according to Althoff's October org chart.","score":0.52232456,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.59,"request_id":"08a717a1-d997-49d4-9acf-837aaf313dc7"}
